en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: miya neko kadro iloko, ’ila ta mwa langai.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.
A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: eene, ai tako langai yako na samosakisakidra.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: ’ila ta langai sa rokodro sa akanea?
en: A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?
B: No, I've already eaten at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: ta maelelre kwane ina cabo neli.
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: ai kane so samanema lo tokodralidraliya?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: ai kanea ko ki tokodraliya ki tatakesikesiya.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: ai kane so samanema lo tokodralidraliya?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: wa’iloka ko sa cabo, ta tadrosa tokodrali.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!

ab: ‘ila ta mwa malimali ki rangciyo eene?
en: A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let's go.

ab: ‘ila ta mwa malimali ki yakiyo eene?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: ini, ai takesi yako ceele sa ‘acase.
en: B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.
A: Can you help me with the cloth?
B: I'm sweeping the floor and you asked Kacaw to carry it for you. *[Kacaw] Please change the name to men of all races.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don't you clean up?
B: I've finished cleaning up.
A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.
B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: lo maka takesinga ai toma neso?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: ai to’alra ko ki talragili mwa senay.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: lo maka takesinga ai tomatoma ko laso?
en: A: What's he doing after school?
B: He's going swimming.
